What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A young girl with long dark hair wears a black velvet top with a red heart detail at the neckline. She holds a silver flute horizontally to her mouth with fingers positioned on the keys. Behind her stands a green artificial Christmas tree adorned with white ornaments. A white music stand with sheet music sits in the foreground. A green leafy plant is visible to the side.

question: Describe what is happening
canonical_answer: A silver concert flute with gold-colored keys is held in a transverse playing position. The musician wears a black long-sleeved top over a red garment. White ornaments hang from the green Christmas tree branches in the background. Sheet music rests on a stand with blue clips in the lower left corner. A green leafy houseplant stands near the tree.

question: Describe the sequence of actions the girl performs with the flute from the beginning of the clip.
canonical_answer: At 0s, the girl raises a silver flute from a vertical position to horizontal; at 4s, she holds the instrument horizontally to her mouth with fingers on keys; at 6s, her lips are positioned on the embouchure hole of the flute; at 14s, her eyes appear closed or cast downward while maintaining the playing position.
